name: roBrowserLegacy Authorized Code Reference
description: Authorized GitHub repository reference for roBrowserLegacy browser client architecture, build stack, WebGL, wsProxy, workers, and client-side integration hints.
permissionNote: User reported authorization from Dodo to analyze and adapt roBrowserLegacy for RagnaForge with provenance, credits, and license traceability.
allowedUse: metadata, README summary, file tree analysis, architectural study, adapter design, and selective incorporation with provenance when justified.
trustPolicy: Authorized code reference is contextual for architecture and client behavior. Local project data and curated internal knowledge still win for validation decisions.
conflictPolicy: This source never blocks alone. It may inform architecture choices, hints, and future adapters, but it does not override local evidence.
updatePolicy: Manual GitHub metadata review and curated knowledge updates only. No accidental full vendoring, no node_modules, no private assets.
refreshPolicy: GitHub metadata and README summary only. No crawler, no raw HTML, no dump, no required token, no persisted clone in Git.
learningPolicy: Technical observations may become review-first candidates or curated pack entries with provenance and license notes.
licensePolicy: Preserve GPL notice, repository URL, and consulted revision metadata when any adaptation or incorporation is proposed.
authorizedUsePolicy: Authorized by user report for analysis, adapter design, and selective incorporation with provenance. Human review remains required.
changelog: 2026-05-23: Added authorized GitHub source metadata and policy for roBrowserLegacy.
notes: No code was copied into this repository in this stage; provenance stays explicit.
